tasks.subject: Task 0: Project setup — deps and pytest
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add pandas/pyarrow/requests runtime deps and pytest dev dep; create tests scaffolding.

**Files:** Modify pyproject.toml; Create tests/__init__.py, tests/conftest.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest -q` exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pyproject.toml", "tests/__init__.py", "tests/conftest.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pandas/pyarrow/requests runtime deps, pytest dev dep", "pytest collects 0 tests without error"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Common data format (data.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pollutant enum, schema (COLUMNS), validate, empty_frame, read/write_parquet.

**Files:** Create src/smoke_sense/data.py, tests/test_data.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_data.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/data.py", "tests/test_data.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_data.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Pollutant maps name/code/unit + from_str", "validate coerces dtypes, errors on missing cols and nulls", "parquet round-trip preserves dtypes/values"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: AQI computation (aqi.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** NowCast (12h PM, 8h O3) + breakpoint AQI conversion, pure functions.

**Files:** Create src/smoke_sense/aqi.py, tests/test_aqi.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_aqi.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/aqi.py", "tests/test_aqi.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_aqi.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["nowcast constant->constant, weighted hand-computed case", "concentration_to_aqi endpoints + interpolated", "compute_aqi returns Int16 series"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Geo resolution (geo.py) + bbox builder
tasks.description:
**Goal:** county FIPS -> BBox from bundled parquet; builder script from Census GeoJSON.

**Files:** Create src/smoke_sense/geo.py, scripts/build_county_bbox.py, tests/test_geo.py, src/smoke_sense/_data/; Modify pyproject.toml

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_geo.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/geo.py", "scripts/build_county_bbox.py", "tests/test_geo.py", "src/smoke_sense/_data/county_bbox.parquet", "pyproject.toml"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_geo.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["bbox_for_county returns BBox, raises on unknown", "bbox_from_geometry handles Polygon/MultiPolygon", "bundled parquet built and loadable"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Provider interface + registry (base.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** AQIProvider ABC + register/get_provider/all_providers registry.

**Files:** Create src/smoke_sense/providers/__init__.py, src/smoke_sense/providers/base.py, tests/test_providers_base.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_providers_base.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/providers/base.py", "src/smoke_sense/providers/__init__.py", "tests/test_providers_base.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_providers_base.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["register/get_provider/all_providers work", "get_provider raises on unknown"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: EPA AQS provider (aqs.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Fetch AQS hourly sampleData by county, per-year split, parse to schema, compute AQI.

**Files:** Create src/smoke_sense/providers/aqs.py, tests/test_providers_aqs.py, tests/fixtures/aqs_sample.json

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_providers_aqs.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/providers/aqs.py", "tests/test_providers_aqs.py", "tests/fixtures/aqs_sample.json"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_providers_aqs.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["_year_ranges splits per calendar year", "_parse -> valid schema with AQI", "unsupported pollutant skipped"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: PurpleAir provider (purpleair.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Fetch sensor history within county bbox, EPA PM2.5 correction, parse to schema, compute AQI.

**Files:** Create src/smoke_sense/providers/purpleair.py, tests/test_providers_purpleair.py; Modify providers/__init__.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_providers_purpleair.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/providers/purpleair.py", "src/smoke_sense/providers/__init__.py", "tests/test_providers_purpleair.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_providers_purpleair.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["epa_correct_pm25 hand-computed", "_parse_history corrects + validates with AQI", "supported {PM2.5,PM10}, O3 skipped"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: CLI orchestration (bin/fetch.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire Typer fetch command: validate FIPS, resolve providers/creds, fetch per county, write Parquet.

**Files:** Modify src/smoke_sense/bin/fetch.py, src/smoke_sense/providers/purpleair.py; Create tests/test_fetch_cli.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest -v` + `uv run smoke-sense fetch --help`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/bin/fetch.py", "src/smoke_sense/providers/purpleair.py", "tests/test_fetch_cli.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["invalid FIPS exits nonzero with clear msg", "per-county providers run, concat, write {fips}_{start}_{end}.parquet", "--source defaults to all, --pollutant filters"]}
```
